title: Visible Potion Tiers
description: Changes the bottle cap color depending on the potion's tier!
body:
**Endefy's Visible Potion Tiers**
This pack changes the bottle cap color depending on the potion's tier!

![Strength Potions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65ad2f947e06c026d4543446ea56b1ceddcdfd0b.png)
